Technical Recruiter @ USM | Full Life Cycle Recruiting

🚀 Now #Hiring: #Lead AI/ML Developer (#Remote | #W2 Contract Opportunity)
Exciting opportunity to join a high-impact AI initiative focused on transforming the Medicare consumer experience through cutting-edge AI.
💼 #Role: Lead #AI/ #ML Developer (Tech Lead – EL4)
📍 #Location: Remote (must be near a Sapient office for potential onsite interview/conversion)
⏳ Duration: 6+ months

🔍 What You'll Do:
• Lead the design and development of AI/ML solutions using GenAI, LLMs, and traditional ML
• Build scalable Python APIs and deploy models on Kubernetes
• Develop semantic search and intelligent data retrieval systems
• Work with modern agentic frameworks and AI coding tools (Copilot, Claude, etc.)
• Collaborate across teams to enhance omni-channel sales & marketing experiences

🧠 What We're Looking For:
✔️ 5+ years in Python & ML (scikit-learn, Databricks)
✔️ 3+ years hands-on with NLP / LLMs (RAG, embeddings, vector DBs) in production
✔️ Experience with supervised/unsupervised ML & advanced analytics
✔️ Exposure to agentic frameworks (MCP, A2A)
✔️ 1–2 years of leadership or supervisory experience
✔️ Strong communication & problem-solving skills

✨ Nice to Have:
• Experience with vision or speech-based GenAI models

📅 Interview Process:
2 internal video rounds + 1 client round
If you're passionate about building scalable AI systems and leading innovative solutions in healthcare, let’s connect!

📩 lakshmikantha@usmsystems.com

📩 Interested? Drop a comment or message me directly. Know someone who fits? Feel free to share!

#AIJobs #MachineLearning #GenAI #LLM #Hiring #TechLead #DataScience #RemoteJobs #HealthcareAI
